title: Avoid crashing when config key is missing
summary: CLI crashes on missing optional config key instead of falling back.
contributionGuide: Issues preferred for behavior changes unless the bug is obvious.
expectedBehavior: CLI should fall back to defaults when optional config is absent.
actualBehavior: CLI throws during startup when the optional key is undefined.
reproductionSteps: Remove the optional key from the config file.
Observe an exception before command parsing completes.
patchOutline: Confirm whether fallback behavior matches current documented expectations.
Guard missing optional config before startup parse.
Add a regression test once behavior is confirmed.
issueHint: Need maintainer confirmation on intended fallback semantics.
